name: Devil Dogs
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening, sugar, and egg together.
2. Add cocoa to the mixture.
3. Sift the flour, baking soda, and salt together, then add them with the milk and vanilla into the mixture.
4. Drop spoonfuls of the batter onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
5. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 8-10 minutes or until cooled.
6. Beat the butter (or margarine), powdered sugar, and vanilla until creamy.
7. Spread the filling between two Devil Dogs on the cooled cookies.
